name: config-deltas
description: Codex config maintenance skills, Python tooling, and changelog automation bundled as a single local plugin.

interface.shortDescription: Codex config maintenance and changelog automation.
interface.longDescription: Bundles config maintenance, key lifecycle, sync, validation, and Codex git changelog automation into one local plugin.
defaultPrompt: Run config maintenance and summarize the generated artifacts.
Classify Codex config keys and explain what changed.
Generate the Codex git changelog using the maintained config workflow.
